fighter.name: Fighter
fighter.description: A master of martial combat, skilled with a variety of weapons and armor

level_2.description: Gain Combat Surge - take an extra action once per day

level_3.description: Choose +2 to one ability (max 18). Gain Extra Attack - make 2 attacks per round

level_4.description: Gain Shield Focus - activate once per day for +1 AC during one combat

level_5.description: Gain Terror Resistance - +1 bonus vs fear effects

wizard.name: Wizard
wizard.description: A scholarly magic-user capable of manipulating the structures of reality

rogue.name: Rogue
rogue.description: A scoundrel who uses stealth and trickery to accomplish what others do by brute force

cleric.name: Cleric
cleric.description: A priestly champion who wields divine magic in service of a higher power

skill_descriptions.Acrobatics: Your Dexterity (Acrobatics) check covers your attempt to stay on your feet in a tricky situation
skill_descriptions.Animal Handling: When there is any question whether you can calm down a domesticated animal
skill_descriptions.Arcana: Your Intelligence (Arcana) check measures your ability to recall lore about spells, magic items, eldritch symbols
skill_descriptions.Athletics: Your Strength (Athletics) check covers difficult situations you encounter while climbing, jumping, or swimming
skill_descriptions.Deception: Your Charisma (Deception) check determines whether you can convincingly hide the truth
skill_descriptions.History: Your Intelligence (History) check measures your ability to recall lore about historical events
skill_descriptions.Insight: Your Wisdom (Insight) check decides whether you can determine the true intentions of a creature
skill_descriptions.Intimidation: When you attempt to influence someone through overt threats, hostile actions, and physical violence
skill_descriptions.Investigation: When you look around for clues and make deductions based on those clues
skill_descriptions.Medicine: A Wisdom (Medicine) check lets you try to stabilize a dying companion or diagnose an illness
skill_descriptions.Perception: Your Wisdom (Perception) check lets you spot, hear, or otherwise detect the presence of something
skill_descriptions.Performance: Your Charisma (Performance) check determines how well you can delight an audience
skill_descriptions.Persuasion: When you attempt to influence someone or a group of people with tact, social graces, or good nature
skill_descriptions.Religion: Your Intelligence (Religion) check measures your ability to recall lore about deities, rites, prayers
skill_descriptions.Sleight of Hand: Whenever you attempt an act of legerdemain or manual trickery
skill_descriptions.Stealth: Make a Dexterity (Stealth) check when you attempt to conceal yourself from enemies
skill_descriptions.Survival: The GM might ask you to make a Wisdom (Survival) check to follow tracks, hunt wild game
